goal: Add a side-effect-free audit authority builder that authorizes release governance approved action consume execution receipt record audit artifacts without merges, PRs, GitHub calls, audit writes, durable persistence, or external release actions.
scope_out: Do not write audits, perform durable receipt writes, consume approved actions, merge, open PRs, call GitHub, call providers, call DB, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write runtime artifacts.
claims: Release governance approved action consume execution receipt record audit preflight artifacts can be authorized without merge or GitHub action.
Audit authority id, authorized-by ref, and expiry ref are required.
Audit writes, merge, external actions, action consumption, and durable persistence remain false.
assumptions: Actual audit writes and release actions require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing audit authority id, and blocked preflight cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, diff-check, and full builder tests pass.
stop_conditions: Audit write, durable receipt write, approved action consumption, merge, PR creation, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or runtime write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-162 produced side-effect-free release governance approved action consume execution receipt record audit preflight artifacts.
